data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_FS_UPLOADINGFILE
data.value: fail apalod kar raha hai {0} ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_DELETING
data.value: {0} hata raha hai ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_HTTP_DESC
data.value: http shel praarambh karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_GET_DESC
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake http sarvar se pratikriya praapt karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_DELETE_DESC
data.value: http sarvar se saamagree hataata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_EXCEPTION_SHELLERROR
data.value: http shel mein ek truti thee:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_GETSTRING_DESC
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake http sarvar se string praapt karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_GETTING
data.value: mil raha hai {0}...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SERVERADDRESSPROMPT
data.value: sarvar pata darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_COMMAND_DETACH_DESC
data.value: diskanekt kie bina shel se baahar nikalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ADDHEADER_DESC
data.value: sabhee aagaamee anurodhon mein kunjee aur maan ke saath ek sheershalekh jodata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_CURRAGENT_DESC
data.value: vartamaan upayogakarta ejent praapt karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_EDITHEADER_DESC
data.value: sabhee aagaamee anurodhon ke lie sheershalekh par ek kunjee sampaadit karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_LSHEADER_DESC
data.value: anurodh sheershalekhon ko soocheebaddh karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_PUT_DESC
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake fail ko http sarvar par daalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_PUTSTRING_DESC
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake string ko http sarvar par daalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_POST_DESC
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake fail ko http sarvar par post karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_POSTSTRING
data.value: nirdisht anurodh ka upayog karake string ko http sarvar par post karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_RMHEADER_
data.value: sabhee aagaamee anurodhon ke lie sheershalekh par ek kunjee nikaalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_SETAGENT_DESC
data.value: upayogakarta ejent set karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_EXCEPTION_HEADEREXISTS
data.value: pahale se maujood sheershalekh jodana.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_EXCEPTION_HEADERNOTEXISTS_REMOVE
data.value: jo sheershalekh maujood nahin hai use hataana.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_EXCEPTION_HEADERNOTEXISTS_EDIT
data.value: jo sheershalekh maujood nahin hai use sampaadit karana.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_DELETECONFIRM
data.value: kya aap vaakee {0} ko hataana chaahate hain?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTP_DEFAULTPRESET_SHOWCASE_SITE
data.value: sait

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_POST_POSTING_FILE
data.value: fail {0} post kee ja rahee hai...

data.value: string ko {0} par post kiya ja raha hai...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_PUT_PUTTING_STRING
data.value: string ko {0} par apalod kiya ja raha hai...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_PROMPTPRESET
data.value: prompt preeset

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_SETTINGS_ENTRYDESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako konfigar karane deta hai ki http shel kaise kaam karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_EXCEPTION_LASTSHELLTYPEMISMATCH
data.value: antim shel yah shel nahin hai jisase alag kiya ja sake.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_EXCEPTION_NOTCONNECTED_1
data.value: klaint abhee tak kanekt nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_KEY_DESC
data.value: hedar kunjee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_VALUE_DESC
data.value: hedar maan

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_REQUEST_DESC
data.value: http anurodh

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_FILE_DESC
data.value: apalod karane ke lie fail

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_HTTP_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_STRING_DESC
data.value: apalod karane ke lie string
